g.text: ENCODER LAYER ARCHITECTURE (POST-LN) | TDD SPEC v1.0.4

g.title: Input tensor with positional encoding integrated

div.p: Sublayer 2 Logic: $FFN(z_1) = \text{ReLU}(z_1 W_1 + b_1) W_2 + b_2$ $z_2 = \text{LayerNorm}(z_1 + \text{Dropout}(FFN(z_1)))$

ol.li: Operation Ordering: Post-LN architecture. Norm is applied after the residual addition.
Parallelism: MHSA heads can be computed concurrently.

g.title: Input tensor with positional encoding integrated
